hero.title: Welcome to VNCultureBridge
hero.subtitle: Discover the profound beauty of Vietnamese culture. From ancient traditions to vibrant modern life, explore a rich tapestry of history, art, and heritage that connects generations.

about.title: Vietnam Cultural Bridge
about.description_1: Vietnam, a nation with thousands of years of civilization, is a place where knowledge and traditional beauty seamlessly blend. From majestic northern mountains to the fertile southern deltas, every inch of land is tied to heroic historical tales, unique customs, and warm hospitality.
about.description_2: Exploring Vietnamese Culture is not just a journey back to its roots, but also an opportunity to experience the diversity of 54 ethnic groups. Each group carries a distinct color yet shares a spirit of unity, forging a vibrant and proud cultural tapestry.

featured.title: Featured Cultural Articles
featured.subtitle: Dive deeper into the traditions, arts, and lifestyle that make Vietnamese culture so exceptionally unique.
featured.default_summary: Discover more stories and travel experiences that reflect the richness of Vietnam.

categories.title: Explore Culture
categories.subtitle: Learn about the distinctive aspects of Vietnamese life, beliefs, and arts through diverse topics.

places.title: Cultural Map
places.subtitle: Touch each region to discover its characteristic cultural features, from North to South.

ethnic.title: 54 Ethnic Communities
ethnic.subtitle: Vietnam proudly hosts 54 ethnic brotherly groups, each carrying a unique cultural identity, from language, clothing, customs to traditional arts, together forming a colorful and brilliant Vietnamese cultural landscape.

ai.title: Explore Culture with AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Chat, ask questions, and dive deeper into all aspects of Vietnamese culture with our smart AI assistant.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.placeholder_login: You must log in to leave a review

footer.desc: Discover and preserve Vietnamese culture through modern AI technology.

explore.title: Discover Vietnam from North to South
explore.subtitle: From the mountains of the Northwest to the Mekong Delta, explore Vietnam’s most remarkable regions, destinations, and travel experiences.
explore.regions_subtitle: Each region offers its own culture, landscapes, local flavors, and travel rhythm.
explore.destinations_subtitle: Places that best represent Vietnam’s nature, history, and local life.
explore.sidebar_subtitle: Choose a suggested place and jump directly into search results.
explore.guide_subtitle: Read editorial highlights to better understand Vietnamese history, culture, and everyday life.
explore.mega_subtitle: Quickly choose a region and browse highlighted destinations for your next trip.
